subagent_repair_dispatch_note: A PackageDeliveryAgent repair subagent was requested for TASTE-001, but native subagent thread limit prevented spawning additional repair agents. The supervisor applied the Designer and PackageDeliveryAgent patch specs directly, preserving the user's one-repair-one-commit rule.
